mainEntity.name: Can any business show up for voice search near me, or do I need a storefront?

acceptedAnswer.text: Your business is more likely to appear if you have a real local presence, a verified listing, and clear service-area information. If you serve customers remotely or from multiple locations, you may still qualify, but the location data has to be consistent and specific.
acceptedAnswer.description: Not every business needs a storefront, but you do need clear local signals. Verified listings, accurate service areas, and consistent contact details matter most.
